data.title: Fertility Specialists of Texas and First Fertility Highlight Scientific Leadership at ASPIRE 2026
data.description: A renowned reproductive care provider in Plano, Texas, Fertility Specialists of Texas and First Fertility revealed groundbreaking research at the ASPIRE Conference 2026. The study conducted by Dr. Carlos Guerrero showcases significant advancements in reproductive medicine, highlighting a patient-centric approach. Dr. Guerrero's work emphasizes scientific excellence and transformative impacts on fertility treatments. This research signifies a shift in understanding fertility, pushing boundaries and unlocking new possibilities for patients.

data.title: Betterness Closes $2.5m Seed Round and Launches Bett-i, the First Fully Autonomous Voice-First Life-Coaching System for Health and Performance
data.description: Betterness has gained support from a diverse group of industry leaders, including those from health-tech, medicine, capital markets, elite athletic performance, and global culture. This backing is for the company's goal of creating the infrastructure for the $6 trillion global health and wellness sector. The announcement was made in Miami.

data.title: CELEBRATING 75 YEARS OF THE AMERICAN ADVERTISING FEDERATION (AAF) ADVERTISING HALL OF FAME
data.description: During a prestigious gala celebration in New York on April 24, 2026, six prominent figures in the industry, two recipients of the President's Award, and one distinguished corporate honoree were recognized. This event marked the 75th Anniversary of the AAF Advertising Hall of Fame (AHOF), known as "The Biggest Night in Advertising." This annual celebration continues to honor outstanding individuals who have made significant contributions to the advertising world.

data.title: American soldier tried to bet on Polymarket using classified info, couldn't pass KYC on Kalshi before betting.
data.description: A member of the U.S. military is facing charges for allegedly using sensitive military information to place bets on Polymarket. However, they were unsuccessful in completing the Know Your Customer (KYC) procedures required by Kalshi.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Rise As Intel Surges; Nvidia Soars (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline on Friday, while the Nasdaq saw an increase supported by Intel's strong performance. AI stocks AMD and Arm also witnessed significant jumps. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 both rose as Intel surged, alongside Nvidia which saw a remarkable increase.
